In the eight OECD countries without a statutory minimum (Austria, Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Italy, Norway, Sweden and Switzerland), sector or occupation-level collective agreements include de-facto wage floors for large parts of the workforce. AUGUST 2025 Any opinions expressed in this paper are those of the author(s) and not those of IZA.", "perspectives": ["Scientific"], "key_facts": ["AUGUST 2025 Any opinions expressed in this paper are those of the author(s) and not those of IZA.", "AUGUST 2025 Ke Lyu University of Nevada-Reno Frank M.", "Fossen University of Nevada-Reno, University of California-Berkeley and IZA ABSTRACT IZA DP No. 18101 AUGUST 2025 How Do Minimum Wages Affect Nonemployer Businesses in the United States?* This paper investigates the impact of minimum wage increases o", "We develop a theoretical model of occupational choice and estimate effects using panel data from the Nonemployer Statistics (2001-2020).", "Results show that a $1 increase in the minimum wage reduces the number of nonemployers by 0.5%- 0.9%, likely due to relatively more attractive wage jobs."], "knowledge_contribution": "Evidence: AUGUST 2025 Any opinions expressed in this paper are those of the author(s) and not those of IZA."}]}
